title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: Catch Qualifying from Round 3 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship
items.content: A busy three-day event at the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship reaches its conclusion today as the sim racers ready themselves for Round 3, the Bahrain Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: A busy three-day event at the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship reaches its conclusion today as the sim racers ready themselves for Round 3, the Bahrain Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 2026年F1模拟赛车世界锦标赛第三轮比赛即将开始，该赛事为期三天的活动今日结束。选手们已准备就绪，将参加巴林大奖赛。

items.title: What the teams said – Race day in Japan
items.content: The drivers and teams report back on all the action from at Suzuka for the of the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: The drivers and teams report back on all the action from at Suzuka for the of the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 2026年日本大奖赛在铃鹿赛道进行，参赛车手和车队分享了比赛日的全部动态。

items.title: Verstappen admits Red Bull are in the ‘midfield battle’
items.content: Max Verstappen was limited to P8 in the Japanese Grand Prix following further struggles with his Red Bull car.
items.contentSnippet: Max Verstappen was limited to P8 in the Japanese Grand Prix following further struggles with his Red Bull car.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 马克斯·维斯塔潘在日本的比赛中驾驶红牛车队赛车，最终排名第八。由于红牛车队在比赛中遇到更多困难，他未能取得更好的成绩。维斯塔潘承认车队目前处于中游竞争状态。

items.title: Leclerc laments Safety Car timing after P3 finish in Japan
items.content: Charles Leclerc believes "we got a little unlucky" during the Japanese Grand Prix due to an ill-timed Safety Car, with the Ferrari driver salvaging third place.
items.contentSnippet: Charles Leclerc believes "we got a little unlucky" during the Japanese Grand Prix due to an ill-timed Safety Car, with the Ferrari driver salvaging third place.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 勒克莱尔认为在日本大奖赛中，由于安全车出动的时机不当，“我们有点不走运”，他在安全车期间从领先位置掉至第三，最终保住了第三名。

items.title: Norris motivated by ‘good signs’ from Japan top-five finish
items.content: McLaren enjoyed their highest scoring round of the season as Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris finished second and fifth respectively in Japan.
items.contentSnippet: McLaren enjoyed their highest scoring round of the season as Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris finished second and fifth respectively in Japan.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: McLaren在日本站取得本赛季最高积分，奥斯卡·皮阿斯特里和兰多·诺里斯分别获得第二和第五名。诺里斯对从日本车迷那里获得的积极信号感到鼓舞。

items.title: Russell believes he ‘probably’ would have won in Japan
items.content: George Russell was left to rue a “frustrating” Japanese Grand Prix, with the Briton feeling that his result “probably would have been a race win” had it not been for the Safety Car emerging only one lap after he made a pit stop.
items.contentSnippet: George Russell was left to rue a “frustrating” Japanese Grand Prix, with the Briton feeling that his result “probably would have been a race win” had it not been for the Safety Car emerging only one lap after he made a pit stop.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 乔治·拉塞尔对日本大奖赛感到“令人沮丧”，他认为如果不是安全车在他进站后仅一圈就出动，他“很可能赢得比赛”。

items.title: Watch the Japanese GP highlights as Antonelli takes win
items.content: Kimi Antonelli claimed his second consecutive win for Mercedes after dropping to sixth on the opening lap in Japan.
items.contentSnippet: Kimi Antonelli claimed his second consecutive win for Mercedes after dropping to sixth on the opening lap in Japan.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 凯米·安东内利在日本的比赛中，尽管起步时跌至第六位，但最终为梅赛德斯车队夺得连续第二场胜利。

items.title: Piastri reacts to bittersweet podium in Japan
items.content: Oscar Piastri maximised his first Grand Prix start of the season, the McLaren driver finishing P2 in Japan.
items.contentSnippet: Oscar Piastri maximised his first Grand Prix start of the season, the McLaren driver finishing P2 in Japan.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 马克斯·皮亚斯特里在日本站把握住本赛季首个大奖赛发车机会，以第二名的成绩完赛。

items.title: Youngest F1 points leader Antonelli reflects on Japan win
items.content: Kimi Antonelli believes it is "still early days to think about the championship" despite taking victory in the Japanese Grand Prix and becoming the youngest driver to lead the championship in Formula 1 history.
items.contentSnippet: Kimi Antonelli believes it is "still early days to think about the championship" despite taking victory in the Japanese Grand Prix and becoming the youngest driver to lead the championship in Formula 1 history.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 韩寒在赢得日本大奖赛后，成为F1历史上最年轻的积分领跑者。尽管取得胜利，但他认为“还早着呢，不能想冠军的事”。

items.title: Piastri gets your Driver of the Day vote in Japan
items.content: His first Grand Prix start of the season and Oscar Piastri totally nailed it, launching his McLaren from its P3 grid slot into the lead at Turn 1.
items.contentSnippet: His first Grand Prix start of the season and Oscar Piastri totally nailed it, launching his McLaren from its P3 grid slot into the lead at Turn 1.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 奥斯卡·皮亚斯特里在日本的比赛中获得了“最佳车手”的选票，他在赛季首次大奖赛比赛中，从P3发车位置起步，在第一弯就冲到了领先位置，表现完美。
